title: Semiconductor dies and devices with frontside and backside coils for inductive coupling
abstract: A semiconductor die is disclosed, including a plurality of transistors at a frontside of a semiconductor substrate, a backside inductor at a backside of the semiconductor substrate; and a frontside inductor at the frontside of the semiconductor substrate. The frontside inductor and the backside inductor are inductively coupled.
claims: 1. A semiconductor die, comprising: a plurality of transistors at a frontside of a semiconductor substrate, a backside inductor at a backside of the semiconductor substrate; and a frontside inductor at the frontside of the semiconductor substrate, wherein the frontside inductor and the backside inductor are configured to be inductively coupled, wherein at least a part of the frontside inductor is formed by an electrically conductive line extending into the semiconductor substrate.
